---
title: "Religion by dissemination area — Montréal"
description: "Religious composition at Statistics Canada's finest standard geography, for the Montréal area (2021 Census)"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import os, json
import pandas as pd
from pipeline.charts import choropleth_groups_map
```

This map drops below the census tract to the **dissemination area (DA)** — Statistics Canada's *smallest* standard geography, about **400–700 people each** — for **Montréal**. Religion is self-reported and asked only once a decade. Other metros are linked from the [main Population page](religion.qmd#religion-by-neighbourhood).

Descriptive only — no "good"/"bad" reading. "No religion / secular" is included, and the Christian denominations are rolled into a single total. **Use the dropdown** to switch groups; zoom and pan to your street.

```{python}
#| echo: false
da_geo = "data/geo/da_montreal_2021.geojson"
da_path = "data/geo/statcan_da_montreal_religion.csv"
if os.path.exists(da_geo) and os.path.exists(da_path):
    geo = json.load(open(da_geo))
    da = pd.read_csv(da_path, dtype={"dauid": str})
    groups = [("christian", "Christian"), ("no_religion", "No religion / secular"),
              ("muslim", "Muslim"), ("hindu", "Hindu"), ("sikh", "Sikh"),
              ("buddhist", "Buddhist"), ("jewish", "Jewish"),
              ("indigenous_spirituality", "Traditional Indigenous spirituality"),
              ("other_religion", "Other religions & spiritual traditions")]
    fig = choropleth_groups_map(geo, da, "dauid", groups, name_col="name",
        colorscale="Cividis", opacity=0.6, center={"lat": 45.55, "lon": -73.65}, zoom=9.0, height=720,
        source_note="Source: 2021 Census (Statistics Canada, Census Profile 98-401-X2021006); % of population by dissemination area, Montréal CMA. Religion is self-reported. Descriptive only.")
    fig.show(config={"displaylogo": False, "scrollZoom": True, "modeBarButtonsToRemove": ["lasso2d", "select2d"]})
else:
    print("Montréal DA religion map not available — run build_da_profile in pipeline.build_census_geo.")
```

*Download: [Montréal DA religion shares (CSV)](../data/geo/statcan_da_montreal_religion.csv) — 2021 Census (Statistics Canada).*

[← Back to Religion](religion.qmd)
